scenario: two-node transport warm-up and alignment sanity check
objective: confirm that both raw capture paths, both AP paths, and the shared block timeline are trustworthy before cooperative capture
instructions: Stay outside both controlled paths while both raw capture processes are started.;;Confirm that both raw files are growing and that the alignment note template is open for editing.;;Do not continue if one node still lacks a trustworthy AP path or serial stream.

scenario: shared empty-scene reference for both nodes
objective: collect the first matched empty cooperative baseline
instructions: Leave the shared operator interaction zone and both controlled paths.;;Keep the room layout unchanged for both Node A and Node B.;;Record any node-specific disturbance immediately in the alignment notes.

scenario: static presence in the shared interaction zone
objective: capture the first matched static cooperative segment
instructions: Stand in the shared midpoint zone chosen to be visible to both Node A and Node B.;;Stay almost still and do not touch any AP, sensor, stand, or helper host.;;If visibility is asymmetric between nodes, record that immediately.

scenario: slow motion through the shared interaction zone
objective: capture the first matched motion cooperative segment
instructions: Move slowly through the shared interaction zone without leaving the region visible to both nodes.;;Keep the topology of both stands unchanged.;;Record any timing drift noticed between the two capture hosts.

scenario: empty recovery after the first cooperative cycle
objective: observe the reverse transition back to empty for both nodes
instructions: Leave both controlled paths again.;;Keep both nodes powered and both raw capture processes running.;;Record any restart or serial glitch explicitly before continuing.

scenario: second static presence in the shared interaction zone
objective: provide an in-session repeat for the cooperative static segment
instructions: Return to approximately the same shared midpoint used in S1.;;Stand almost still and avoid unnecessary motion.;;Confirm in notes that both raw streams are still recording.

scenario: second slow motion in the shared interaction zone
objective: provide an in-session repeat for the cooperative motion segment
instructions: Repeat the same slow-motion pattern used in M1 as closely as practical.;;Do not move APs, sensors, helper hosts, or cables.;;Record whether node-wise timing still appears coherent.

scenario: final empty recovery for cooperative upper-bound anchoring
objective: finish with a matched empty reference and complete alignment notes
instructions: Leave the shared interaction zone one final time and keep both capture processes running until the block ends.;;Stop raw capture only after both nodes have finished the same block timeline.;;Fill the final trust verdict in the alignment notes before treating the bundle as usable.
